MORDREDSABER-MASKED_KNIGHT_FORM_POWER.de: #The helm is on, your parameters sealed. Your Attacks deal 2 less. At the start of your turn, gain 5 NP Charge. At the end of your turn, retain up to 10 Block.
MORDREDSABER-MASKED_KNIGHT_FORM_POWER.sm: #The helm is on, your parameters sealed. Your Attacks deal 2 less. At the start of your turn, gain 5 NP Charge. At the end of your turn, retain up to 10 Block.
MORDREDSABER-REBELLION_FORM_POWER.title: Rebellion
MORDREDSABER-REBELLION_FORM_POWER.descri: #The helm is off. Your Attacks deal 2 more. You take 2 more damage from each enemy hit.
MORDREDSABER-REBELLION_FORM_POWER.smartD: #The helm is off. Your Attacks deal 2 more. You take 2 more damage from each enemy hit.
MORDREDSABER-CRIMSON_LIGHTNING_FORM_POWE: #Wreathed in crimson lightning. Your Attacks deal 2 more. At the start of your turn, gain 5 NP Charge. At the end of your turn, retain up to 10 Block. No penalty. This form cannot be replaced.
